pull_request.title: Bump org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17 from 8.75.5 to 8.75.6
pull_request.body:
Bumps [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) from 8.75.5 to 8.75.6.
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17's releases.

8.75.6

What's Changed

  • Fix C# RPC: RecipeDescriptor alignment by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6942
  • Python: Fixing cross-module recipe calls by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6956
  • Fix IllegalArgumentException: Bad escape for file:// Maven repos with non-ASCII paths by @​pstreef in openrewrite/rewrite#6960
  • Add Reset JSON-RPC handler to JS and C# RPC servers by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6964
  • C#: Wire auto-format into template engine via RoslynFormatter by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6965
  • Fix AddSettingsPluginRepository duplicate pluginManagement and repository handling by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6959
  • C#: Fix RPC sender/receiver alignment and CompilationUnit fields by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6961
  • Add test for parsing deeply nested Kotlin class references by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6968
  • C#: Fix incomplete visitor traversal in JavaVisitor.cs and CSharpVisitor.cs by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6970
  • C#: Parse attribute lists on type declarations by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6971
  • JS: Fast-path method name check in semantic comparator by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6973
  • JavaScript: Upgrade diff to v8 by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6974
  • Fix ChangeDependency isAcceptable to reject PlainText files by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6976
  • Groovy: guard calls to isSealed() with the check for Groovy 4 by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6975
  • C#: Fix whitespace violations in parser by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6977
  • Place fenced afterSyntax markers before trailing newline in PlainText diffs by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite#6967
  • C#: Parse attributes on fields, methods, constructors, and event fields by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6978
  • C#: Fix using var declaration keyword leaking into Space fields by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6979
  • Use source file charset when converting diff bytes to String by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6982
  • C#: Consolidate namespace and compilation unit model by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6981
  • Upgrade kotlin-reflect from 1.6.10 to 2.2.0 by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6984
  • C#: Fix RPC delta computation and extract RecipeScheduler by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6985
  • Batch consecutive same-RPC recipes via BatchVisit RPC by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6983
  • Fix BatchVisit over-attributing RecipesThatMadeChanges marker by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6987
  • C#: Add DataTable, DataTableStore, and CsvDataTableStore by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6988
  • Initialize ScanningRecipe accumulator key eagerly for thread safety by @​pstreef in openrewrite/rewrite#6914
  • Add favicon at project root by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6980
  • HasSourceSet should match any SourceFile, not just Java files by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6989

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.75.5...v8.75.6

Commits
  • dfd9cec HasSourceSet should match any SourceFile, not just Java files (#6989)
  • 9ce116a Add favicon (#6980)
  • c22f89b Initialize ScanningRecipe accumulator key eagerly (#6914)
  • 4e23b2e C#: Add DataTable, DataTableStore, and CsvDataTableStore (#6988)
  • ada9de6 Fix BatchVisit over-attributing RecipesThatMadeChanges marker (#6987)
  • 413e3da Optimize batch search result collection with single fenced print
  • a2e3e78 Optimize batch search result collection from O(recipes × treeSize) to O(treeS...
  • 977742f C#: Skip SearchResult collection for unmodified trees in BatchVisit
  • 9e5ad77 C#: Skip non-C# source files in Visit and BatchVisit RPC handlers
  • 43a35ac Suppress CS8602/CS8603/CS8604 nullable warnings
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17&package-manager=maven&previous-version=8.75.5&new-version=8.75.6)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
